en.extract:
The Sunda minivet (Pericrocotus miniatus) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae.
It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs on secondary forests of Sumatra and Java.

The '''Sunda minivet''' ('''''Pericrocotus miniatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]], where it occurs on secondary forests<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Rohman |first1=S N |last2=Mardiastuti |first2=A |last3=Mulyani |first3=Y A |date=2023-07-01 |title=Bird diversity in several land use types in Boyolali, Central Java |journal=IOP Conference Series: Earth and Environmental Science |volume=1220 |issue=1 |article-number=012009 |doi=10.1088/1755-1315/1220/1/012009 |issn=1755-1307|doi-access=free |bibcode=2023E&ES.1220a2009R }}</ref> of [[Sumatra]] and [[Java]].

巽他山椒鸟（学名：Pericrocotus miniatus）是山椒鸟科山椒鸟属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。
